entities.name: MECEM Principles
entities.context: Framework for organizing information: Mutually Exclusive, Collectively Exhaustive, Minimally Repeating

entities.name: Mutually Exclusive
entities.context: Principle that each piece of information belongs in exactly one canonical location

entities.name: Collectively Exhaustive
entities.context: Principle that all relevant information is captured somewhere in the system

entities.name: Minimally Repeating
entities.context: Principle that information is stored once and referenced everywhere else

entities.name: B40
entities.context: Bucket for strategic and tactical decisions

entities.name: B41
entities.context: Bucket for action items, references B40 for context

entities.name: B45
entities.context: Bucket for operations and process topics

entities.name: B46
entities.context: Bucket for hiring and team topics

entities.name: B48
entities.context: Bucket for strategic memos, used for meetings ≥30min with significant strategic decisions

entities.name: Cross-Reference Format
entities.context: Notation system using format like [B40.D3] to link between buckets and items

relationships.context: Action items reference B40 for strategic rationale (WHY)
Strategic memos synthesize content from decision buckets
Notation system enables linking to specific decisions like [B40.D3]
Notation system enables linking to specific action items like [B41.A5]
Notation system enables linking to unresolved items like [B47.Q2]
